structure.right_col: flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-1.5 (Tweet text + Actions line)

components.name: OutreachDesignPreview
components.description: A standalone preview page for testing 4 variations of the outreach handle row.

accessibility.contrast: Using APCA validated text-blue-600 against white for engaged tweets.
accessibility.aria: Adding titles to all icon buttons to describe their function.

instructions_to_main_agent: A new route '/admin/outreach/design-preview' has been added to App.js and OutreachDesignPreview.jsx has been created. The file fetches real data from /api/admin/outreach/medalists and renders 4 different candidate row layouts. No other files were modified. The user can review the designs and select one for later implementation.
